description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a flat roof and a combination of wood and glass exterior finishes. The front facade showcases large floor-to-ceiling windows and two prominent balconies, providing ample natural light and outdoor space. The structure is set on a green, landscaped base with a sloped driveway leading to a garage on one side. The rear and side elevations display a more private arrangement with smaller windows and solid wood paneling. The overall form is characterized by clean lines, boxy volumes, and a staggered arrangement of the upper stories. The house appears spacious, with multiple entry points and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood paneling, and spacious balconies, set on a landscaped green base.
description_view_0: Front view with large glass windows, two balconies, and the main entryway visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the garage entrance, sloped driveway, and a mix of large and small windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and solid wood paneling, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a secondary entry door, vertical window strips, and a clear view of the house's staggered levels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a modern door, steps leading up, and a covered balcony above; minimal decorative elements.
